# Dasturkhon

> Dasturkhon is a modern recipe manager and pantry planner designed specifically for Uzbek cuisine, built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Express, and Prisma.

## Repository Map

- [src/app](file:///d:/GitHub/Dasturkhon/src/app): React frontend application files.
  - [components](file:///d:/GitHub/Dasturkhon/src/app/components): Reusable UI components.
  - [pages](file:///d:/GitHub/Dasturkhon/src/app/pages): Frontend application pages (Recipes, Pantry, Shopping List, Auth, Admin).
  - [lib](file:///d:/GitHub/Dasturkhon/src/app/lib): Frontend libraries, API client, and utility files.
- [server](file:///d:/GitHub/Dasturkhon/server): Express backend application.
  - [index.js](file:///d:/GitHub/Dasturkhon/server/index.js): Main backend server entry point and API route configuration.
  - [prisma](file:///d:/GitHub/Dasturkhon/server/prisma): Prisma database schemas for SQLite (dev) and Postgres (prod).
- [deploy](file:///d:/GitHub/Dasturkhon/deploy): Deployment configurations including Caddyfile, systemd services, and deploy scripts.

## Key Developer Information

- **Tech Stack**: React + Vite + Tailwind (Frontend); Express + Prisma (Backend); Neon Postgres (Production DB).
- **Internationalization (i18n)**: Uzbek (Latin) + Russian are first-class, English is third. All user-facing strings must be translated in `src/i18n/locales/` files.
- **Branding**: Color palette of teal, gold, and terracotta. Use official assets in `src/app/assets/`.
- **Database Schema**: SQLite for local dev, Postgres for prod. Additive changes should be made to `ensureSchema()` in `server/index.js` for zero-downtime safe migrations.
- **Hosting**: Hetzner VPS behind Caddy for automatic HTTPS or Vercel.
